name: DixitaChatBot
description: A Next-Generation AI Chatbot for Telegram with over 210K+ real conversations.

BOT_TOKEN.description: A Bot token from @BotFather on Telegram

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB Connection String. Get it from https://cloud.mongodb.com

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram User ID (Get it from @MissRose_bot using /id)

REDIS_URL.description: Optional: Redis URL (e.g. from Upstash) for caching. Leave empty to use only MongoDB.
